---
name: Content Suggestion
about: Propose new topics, expanded coverage, or structural improvements
title: "[Suggestion] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Type of Suggestion

- [ ] New topic or section
- [ ] Expand existing coverage
- [ ] New real-world example or case study
- [ ] Structural reorganization
- [ ] New appendix content
- [ ] Other: ___

## Relevant Book/Chapter

Which book or chapter does this relate to? (Leave blank if it's a new topic)

## Description

Describe your suggestion in detail.

## Why This Matters

Explain why this would improve the book for readers.

## References

Link to any relevant sources, research, or examples that support this suggestion.

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] I'd like to write this content myself (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I'm suggesting this for others to write
